data.title: Justin Sun: Resolutely hold FDT accountable for fraud
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: TRON founder Justin Sun expressed his determination to support and ensure that all scammers are held accountable according to the law. He emphasized that First Digital Trust (FDT) should no longer deceive the public in Hong Kong or other regions in the name of a licensed institution.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 84,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.24% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 05, 2025, 01:49 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 84,000 USDT and is now trading at 83,974.109375 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.24% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Warns of Economic Downturn and Advises Alternative Investments
data.description:
According to Odaily, Robert Kiyosaki, author of 'Rich Dad Poor Dad,' has stated on social media that the largest stock market crash he predicted in his book 'Rich Dad's Prophecy' has arrived. He claims the current economy has entered a recession and may fall into a depression. Kiyosaki advises investors to focus on non-Wall Street assets, particularly physical gold, silver, and Bitcoin.

Kiyosaki highlights that after the collapse of paper asset markets, the Federal Reserve and the Treasury Department might resort to extensive money printing, which would lead to an increase in the value of gold, silver, and Bitcoin. He emphasizes that the rise in these asset prices actually reflects a decline in the value of the dollar, resulting in higher prices for essentials such as food, housing, and energy, indicating inflation.

data.title: Circle Reevaluates IPO Timeline Amid U.S.-China Trade Tensions
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Wall Street Journal reports that Circle is reassessing the timeline for its initial public offering (IPO) due to the escalating trade tensions between the United States and China. The ongoing trade war has prompted the company to reconsider its plans, reflecting the broader impact of geopolitical issues on business strategies.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Faces Worst Week in Five Years as Nasdaq Enters Bear Market
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. stock market experienced its most severe week in five years, with the Nasdaq Composite Index entering a technical bear market. On Friday, U.S. Eastern Time, the three major stock indices closed sharply lower. The S&P 500 Index fell by 5.97%, marking its largest single-day drop since March 2020. For the week, it declined by 9.08%, the biggest weekly drop since March 2020. The Nasdaq Composite Index decreased by 5.82%, falling more than 20% from its all-time high closing record, confirming its entry into a technical bear market. Meanwhile, the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped by 5.50%, closing over 10% below its all-time high closing record, confirming its entry into a correction phase.

data.title: ETN Eternal Protocol Ecological Token is about to be launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, ETN Eternal Protocol Ecological Token will be launched on PancakeSwap at 15:00 on April 7th to start trading.
It is reported that ETN is the ecological token of the Snowball AI Intelligent Trading System jointly launched by Singapore Yutian Capital and Snowball Intelligent Trading Laboratory. ETN combines the DeepSeek large model with multi-dimensional technical analysis to achieve intelligent arbitrage in the encrypted digital currency market.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: BTC holders need to learn to love tariffs, maybe we finally break the correlation with Nasdaq
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes wrote on the X platform that BTC holders need to learn to love tariffs. Maybe we finally broke the connection with Nasdaq and can become the purest "smoke alarm" of fiat currency liquidity.

data.title: Sui Lianchuang responded to Paradigm CTO: I have believed that there are problems with Solidity and EVM since 2018
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Paradigm CTO Georgios Konstantopoulos posted on the X platform that there are problems with the current state of Solidity, questioning whether to continue to improve Solidity, turn to Vyper, or develop new languages, or even consider a RISCV runtime based on Rust.
In response, Sui co-founder said that he was curious about why Paradigm CTO's views changed after long-term participation in Solidity ecosystem and tool development, and said that he had believed that there were problems with Solidity and EVM since 2018, but he had not seen any new events that changed his views recently.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Suggests Bitcoin May Break Free from Nasdaq Correlation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Arthur Hayes recently expressed on social media that Bitcoin holders should embrace tariff policies, suggesting that Bitcoin might finally break free from its correlation with the Nasdaq. Hayes believes Bitcoin could become the ultimate indicator of fiat liquidity.

The comments come after a significant downturn in the U.S. stock market. The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed down by 2231 points, the S&P 500 fell by 5.97%, and the Nasdaq dropped by 5.82%. The Dow has retreated more than 10% from its record closing high, entering a correction phase, while the Nasdaq has fallen over 20%, marking a bear market.

In contrast, Bitcoin experienced a relatively stable day, with a fluctuation range of only 3%, ultimately closing with gains on the daily chart.

data.title: PayPal Expands Cryptocurrency Offerings with Chainlink and Solana
data.description: According to PANews, PayPal has announced that users of PayPal and Venmo can now directly purchase, hold, sell, and transfer the cryptocurrencies Chainlink (LINK) and Solana (SOL) within their accounts. This move expands PayPal's cryptocurrency offerings, providing users with more options for digital asset transactions.
